url.label: Meilisearch URL
url.description: Base URL of your Meilisearch instance

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.placeholder: Leave blank if no key is set
apiKey.description: Optional master or search API key

indexes.label: Indexes
indexes.description: Comma-separated list of indexes to search

titleField.label: Title Field
titleField.description: Document field to use as the result title

urlField.label: URL Field
urlField.description: Document field to use as the result link

contentField.label: Content Field
contentField.description: Document field to use as the result snippet

thumbnailField.label: Thumbnail Field
thumbnailField.description: Document field for the result thumbnail image (optional)
